nasb.text: He shall slay it on the side of the altar northward before the Lord, and Aaron’s sons the priests shall sprinkle its blood around on the altar.

esv.text: and he shall kill it on the north side of the altar before the Lord, and Aaron’s sons the priests shall throw its blood against the sides of the altar.

cnv.text: 他要在耶和華面前，在祭壇的北面，把羊宰殺；亞倫子孫作祭司的，要把羊血潑在祭壇的四周。

ccb.text: 献祭者要在祭坛北面，在耶和华面前宰羊。祭司——亚伦的子孙要把羊血洒在祭坛四周。
